sa:content.sa:text: An ability can never be raised higher than 20 without bonuses from magic or equipment.
Lets you swing that hammer harder or lift those big weights.
When a character is built from two archetypes, add together any starting credit values or starting credit bonuses from both archetypes before rolling.
If one or both archetypes tell you to roll for credits, make those rolls after the archetype values are combined. If both archetypes grant a credits roll, roll each one and add the results.
If the archetypes disagree on how to handle starting credits, use both rules and total the results unless the GM says otherwise.
